mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adoption_application ( applicant_id, applicant_name, applicant_phone, applicant_address, animal_id, animal_name, animal_type, application_reason, living_condition, has_other_pets, family_members, work_situation, status ) VALUES ( #{applicantId}, #{applicantName}, #{applicantPhone}, #{applicantAddress}, #{animalId}, #{animalName}, #{animalType}, #{applicationReason}, #{livingCondition}, #{hasOtherPets}, #{familyMembers}, #{workSituation}, #{status} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE adoption_application
applicant_id = #{applicantId},
applicant_name = #{applicantName},
applicant_phone = #{applicantPhone},
applicant_address = #{applicantAddress},
animal_id = #{animalId},
animal_name = #{animalName},
animal_type = #{animalType},
application_reason = #{applicationReason},
living_condition = #{livingCondition},
has_other_pets = #{hasOtherPets},
family_members = #{familyMembers},
work_situation = #{workSituation},
status = #{status},
audit_time = #{auditTime},
auditor_id = #{auditorId},
auditor_name = #{auditorName},
audit_remark = #{auditRemark},
adoption_time = #{adoptionTime},
adoption_contract_no = #{adoptionContractNo},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, applicant_id AS applicantId, applicant_name AS applicantName, applicant_phone AS applicantPhone, applicant_address AS applicantAddress, animal_id AS animalId, animal_name AS animalName, animal_type AS animalType, application_reason AS applicationReason, living_condition AS livingCondition, has_other_pets AS hasOtherPets, family_members AS familyMembers, work_situation AS workSituation, status, audit_time AS auditTime, auditor_id AS auditorId, auditor_name AS auditorName, audit_remark AS auditRemark, adoption_time AS adoptionTime, adoption_contract_no AS adoptionContractNo, is_deleted AS isDeleted, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM adoption_application WHERE id = #{id}
